sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20538" key="bouke/nths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βου-κέντης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n20538.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">goader of oxen, ox-driver</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0097.tlg001:7:86" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diogenian.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.86</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
